name_en: M25445 Black Ostrich This Slim Trunk handbag draws inspiration from Louis Vuitton's traditional trunks, featuring nailhead trim and a metal S-lock clasp on ostrich leather to showcase an avant-garde rock style. The glossy chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering various carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (Length x Height x Width)
